question: what is your projects
answer:
We have a range of projects showcasing our expertise in web development and IT solutions. Some of our featured projects include:

*   **UrbanAxis:** A Next.js website developed with a focus on SEO for business growth. You can learn more here: [UrbanAxis: Next.js Website with SEO for Business Growth](https://bharathatechno.com/work/urban-axis)
*   **EverwinPT:** Static website development to enhance online presence.
*   **Train 2 Gain:** Custom WordPress website development for this client.
*   **Sachniti:** Static website development for Sachniti.
*   **Intignus Biotech:** Custom WordPress website development.
*   **R3Constructor:** Next.js website development.
*   **Snumero:** A Next.js website with local SEO optimization.
*   **Trendy Threads:** An e-commerce web app.
*   **Nikita's Curry Corner:** A custom Indian food delivery website.

We also have a fitness platform called Shrednshape. You can explore more of our work on our website.

sources.title: UrbanAxis: Next.js Website with SEO for Business Growth
Train 2 Gain: Custom WordPress Website Development
